title: evosmia verticillata
intro: Evosmia verticillata, also known as sweetflower or rosy periwinkle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to be antiseptic and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Evosmia verticillata include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Evosmia verticillata can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, although its preparations and uses are not as widely documented as other medicinal plants.
